steps.title: Identify the goal-defining detail
steps.content: The goal is to “indicate the size” of the refuge. Only one note conveys size: “It encompasses 2,276 acres.”

steps.title: Find the choice with acreage
steps.content: Choice B includes the acreage: “encompasses 2,276 acres.” The other three omit it, focusing on management, habitat, or administrative roles instead. That matches choice B — B is correct.
